REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT BELL FUND VII CADENCE, LLC'S MOTION TO RECLASSIFY CASE FROM UNLIMITED JURISDICTION TO LIMITED JURISDICTION (CCP 403.040). NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DENIED. THE COURT NOTES THAT DEFENDANT'S INTERPRETATION OF ICRAA RELIES ON AN UNPUBLISHED FEDERAL CASE. EVEN IF THE COURT ACCEPTED THE ARGUMENT THAT PLAINTIFF'S STATUTORY DAMAGES COULD NOT EXCEED $10,000, THE PRAYER FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES MEANS THAT THE AMOUNT IN CONTROVERSY DOES NOT NECESSARILY FALL BELOW $35,000. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reclassify Case From Unlimited Jurisdiction To Limited Jurisdiction (Cal. Code Civ. Proc. 403.040)
Off Calendar Aug-25-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT BELL FUND VII CADENCE, LLC'S MOTION TO RECLASSIFY CASE FROM UNLIMITED JURISDICTION TO LIMITED JURISDICTION (CCP 403.040)

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DENIED. The Court notes that Defendant's interpretation of ICRAA relies on an unpublished federal case. Even if the Court accepted the argument that Plaintiff's statutory damages could not exceed $10,000, the prayer for punitive damages means that the amount in controversy does not necessarily fall below $35,000. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)
